sections.title: Entering Daimon's Crater for the first time

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Excuse me! This area is different than the rest of the Wilderness, are you sure you understand the rules?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: I can tell you everything you need to know, but if you're in a rush then be warned my overlords will NOT be happy if they find you to be fighting with no honour.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Just don't go doing anything silly like selling your soul to your opponent else there will be big trouble!

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: [How may I help you, sir/How may I help you, madam/How may I help you]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to learn the rules of combat in this arena!

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Sure. Which part do you want to learn?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about Targets.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Sure. Upon entering the arena, you will be assigned a Target based on your combat level, and if you wish to adjust the range of potential Targets, you may do so by speaking with the Trader.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you wish to change your Target, you may skip your current one, but please note that if you skip three skulled Targets within 30 minutes, you will not be able to receive a new Target for the next 30 minutes.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Additionally, it's worth mentioning that killing a player who is not your Target will not reward you with any bonuses related to Emblem or Bounty Hunter Points.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Emblems.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: After defeating your Target, you may come across a tier one Emblem. Defeating another Target will level up the Emblem; the higher its tier, the greater its value.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you die while carrying an Emblem, its tier will be reduced by one. If you die with a Tier 1 emblem, you will lose the emblem.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: You may use Bounty Hunter Points to purchase a tier one Emblem from the Trader, or sell your own Emblem to him for Bounty Hunter Points. You can only have one Emblem at a time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you explain Bounty Hunter Points to me?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: You can earn Bounty Hunter Points by defeating your target or selling Emblems to the Trader. Once you have Bounty Hunter Points, you may use them to purchase rewards from the reward shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Coffer for?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: To participate in Bounty Hunter, you must have a certain amount of coins in your Coffer, which varies based on your combat level. Currently you need at least [x] coins to participate.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you are unskulled and another person kills you in Bounty Hunter, [x] coins will be deducted from your Coffer and given to your killer.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you are skulled, 10,000 coins will be deducted from your Coffer and given to your killer. However, any surplus money in your Coffer will remain safe.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: To manage your Coffer, talk to the Trader.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get bounty crates?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Well, if you want crates, you'll need to be fighting a target in the arena while having a minimum value of risked items on you. Anything you can protect, we won't count.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you meet these requirements, we'll keep track of how long you're in there for. We'll occasionally give you a bonus if you die as well.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: When you kill a target, if you've been in long enough, you'll get a crate. If you've been in there longer, you'll get a higher value crate.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: The crates don't contain anything special; just coins and supplies to help cover what you'll use in the crater.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you keep killing your target, you probably won't get many high value crates, but you'll certainly get a lot more points and Emblems instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you corrupt my Ancient Warrior armour?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Of course. Just show me the armour and I'll get it done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know anything about Bounty Hunter hats?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Ah yes, you'll be able to collect them from me, once you've got some targeted kills that is.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Ah yes! I've been told to hold onto some hats for you, for your uhm... deeds in the wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh wonderful, can I take a look?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: I'm afraid you've already got one of those hats, I can't let you have another.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: I'm afraid you've got nowhere to put a hat if I gave one to you.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Here you go, enjoy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me my current EP value?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Of course. Your current EP value is [number]%.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: [How may I help you, sir/How may I help you, madam/How may I help you]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Beyond this portal lies Daimon's Crater, a place where you'll fight other adventurers like yourself for glory and rewards.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Sadly, I can't let you into Daimon's Crater right now.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you step through this portal, you'll be taken to Daimon's Crater, where we've set up a lobby area for you to ready yourself for combat.

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: If you'd like, I can explain the rules of Bounty Hunter to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I access my Bounty Hunter coffer?

lines.speaker: Corrupted Warrior
lines.text: Certainly. Would you like to add or remove coins from it?
